fields.name: Result
fields.value: Error messages on a computer are a sign that there may be physical or logical damage within your hard drive. See how to react to these messages here. (https://www.securedatarecovery.com/blog/top-5-common-error-messages-computers-mean)  The webpage provides information on the top 5 common error messages that people receive on their computers, the damage the message can signify, and how people can react to them appropriately. The error messages include Blue Screen of Death, "The application is not open anymore," Boot Device Not Found, Unable to install application, and SMART Hard Disk Error 301. The webpage suggests solutions to these errors, such as booting the computer in safe mode, freeing up space by deleting files, and updating the computer. The webpage also advises users to have a backup plan in the event of data loss and to contact Secure Data Recovery Services for data recovery. Jun 1, 2023 — The Most Common Error Messages on Computer · Table of contents · Blue Screen of Death (BSoD) · Boot Device Not F
